content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 18, 2005

Marsha Prillwitz
4468 Wyman Drive
Sacramento, CA 95821

Re: Request for Advice
File No. W-04-215

Dear Ms. Prillwitz:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 Per our telephone conversation on April 15, 2005, we are withdrawing your October 2, 2004 request. Should you have any questions regarding this, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Galena West
Counsel, Legal Division

GW:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-04-215

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
